item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-7461 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-7461 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
Improper neutralization of inputs used in an OS command in the FSx Windows File Server volume mounting component in Amazon ECS Agent on Windows before version 1.103.0 might allow a remote authenticated threat actor to execute shell commands with SYSTEM privileges on the underlying host via a specially crafted username field in an ECS task definition. This issue requires permissions to register ECS task definitions or...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7461

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2024-13362 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2024-13362 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.1
Resumo:
Multiple plugins and/or themes for WordPress are vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the url parameter in various versions due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that execute if they can successfully trick a user into performing an action such as clicking on a link.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-13362

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-14688 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-14688 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.3 for Linux, UNIX and Windows (includes Db2 Connect Server) could allow an authenticated user to cause a denial of service due to improper neutralization of special elements in data query logic when certain configurations exist.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-14688

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-6498 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-6498 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Five Star Restaurant Reservations plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to a payment bypass via PHP type juggling in versions up to, and including, 2.7.16 This is due to the valid_payment() function using a PHP loose comparison (==) between the attacker-controlled payment_id POST parameter and the booking's stripe_payment_intent_id property. When an unauthenticated attacker submits a request to the nopriv AJAX handl...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6498

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8225-1: Python marshmallow vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8225-1: Python marshmallow vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
Jared Deckard discovered that Python marshmallow did not correctly handle hiding certain fields. An attacker could possibly use this issue to leak sensitive information. (CVE-2018-17175) It was discovered that Python marshmallow did not efficiently handle merging certain objects. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, Ubuntu...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8225-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Microsoft's patch for a 0-day exploited by Russian spies fell short. Another Windows flaw is under attack - theregister.com
item.description:
💣 Microsoft's patch for a 0-day exploited by Russian spies fell short. Another Windows flaw is under attack - theregister.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Windows Server. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMid0FVX3lxTE1LSkdLMzhsUktUWnVJWU9xbFJQcVdFTjkxVHlORDU2VGpVN3JCZERSd2JvMEY1Y3lrSGRYZmp0NmlJaGprbms5bnNULXZ4Q2M1WWN1LXRyc0FSaEhFUGtad0lReDloc1pWdkZjWE9BX0pmVUd4SHM0?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] Poisoned Ruby Gems and Go Modules Exploit CI Pipelines for Credential Theft
item.description:
💣 Poisoned Ruby Gems and Go Modules Exploit CI Pipelines for Credential Theft
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new software supply chain attack campaign has been observed using sleeper packages as a conduit to subsequently push malicious payloads that enabled credential theft, GitHub Actions tampering, and SSH persistence. The activity has been attributed to the GitHub account "BufferZoneCorp," which has published a set of repositories that are associated with malicious Ruby gems and Go modules.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/poisoned-ruby-gems-and-go-modules.html

item.title: [Segurança] Two Cybersecurity Professionals Get 4-Year Sentences in BlackCat Ransomware Attacks
item.description:
📰 Two Cybersecurity Professionals Get 4-Year Sentences in BlackCat Ransomware Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Department of Justice (DoJ) on Thursday announced the sentencing of two cybersecurity professionals to four years each in prison for their role in facilitating BlackCat ransomware attacks in 2023. Ryan Goldberg, 40, of Georgia, and Kevin Martin, 36, of Texas, were accused of deploying the ransomware against multiple victims located throughout the U.S.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/two-cybersecurity-professionals-get-4.html

item.title: [Segurança] PoC Released for Critical ASUSTOR ADM Root RCE Vulnerability - cyberpress.org
item.description:
📰 PoC Released for Critical ASUSTOR ADM Root RCE Vulnerability - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a SentinelOne, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiaEFVX3lxTE9WZjRfUDZySlh3Z2xtaWtORTR6RS0ySEhGSTY5QTUwNkktQ1NjaU5MZDhIMFd1anE0NmUyOVNLS3N5MVpJMUVDblpVeVJsMjlhMkgzQWpaazNHZ2JiRkstYnpwNTBuRUVQ?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8218-1: zuluCrypt vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8218-1: zuluCrypt vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Aaron Rainbolt discovered that zuluCrypt used insecure PolicyKit settings in zuluPolkit. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause local privilege escalation to root.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8218-1

item.title: [Segurança] US ransomware negotiators get 4 years in prison over BlackCat attacks
item.description:
📰 US ransomware negotiators get 4 years in prison over BlackCat attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Two former employees of cybersecurity incident response companies Sygnia and DigitalMint were sentenced to four years in prison each for targeting U.S. companies in BlackCat (ALPHV) ransomware attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/us-ransomware-negotiators-get-4-years-in-prison-over-blackcat-attacks/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] From Security Blocked to Prod Ready: ClickHouse on Docker Hardened Images
item.description:
📰 From Security Blocked to Prod Ready: ClickHouse on Docker Hardened Images
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In November 2025, a team self-hosting Langfuse, an open-source LLM observability platform, on Kubernetes uploaded their ClickHouse image to AWS ECR as part of their production preparation. They found that the pipeline scanner had returned three critical vulnerabilities - not in ClickHouse, but in the base image. Their security team saw the findings and blocked...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/from-security-blocked-to-prod-ready-clickhouse-on-docker-hardened-images/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Urgent warning over critical Linux kernel privilege escalation bug: tiny script grants root - Cybernews
item.description:
📰 Urgent warning over critical Linux kernel privilege escalation bug: tiny script grants root - Cybernews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação aborda uma vulnerabilidade de elevação de privilégio envolvendo Ubuntu, o que pode ampliar o impacto de um comprometimento inicial.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxNSWdaUkdxS3lidnFTcFZjNTNJY1I0cHQtR0FZbmpPLWVVVmlvTFlvUmVqeV9OcHR3VWdzczFWWnZpTWxGejRFcWRZN1ZINFBMZU9NNUJVV0UwUUU3MFZrUE02Znp3N2ZobmJOQjB0NmZyWGV2TGx4YklDTlBaN0pwbzNoS2ZxZTA?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] FBI links cybercriminals to sharp surge in cargo theft attacks
item.description:
📰 FBI links cybercriminals to sharp surge in cargo theft attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) warned the transportation and logistics industry of a sharp rise in cyber-enabled cargo theft, with estimated losses in the United States and Canada reaching nearly $725 million in 2025.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/fbi-links-cybercriminals-to-sharp-surge-in-cargo-theft-attacks/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Built on patterns: How Susan Chang’s econometrics roots drive machine learning for security and her minimalist workspace
item.description:
📰 Built on patterns: How Susan Chang’s econometrics roots drive machine learning for security and her minimalist workspace
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
By Elastic Culture April 30, 2026 Share on Twitter Share on Twitter Share on LinkedIn Share on LinkedIn Share on Facebook Share on Facebook Share by Email Share by Email Print this page Print TOP DOWN PROFILE Susan Chang Location: Boston, MA Occupation: Principal Data Scientist Organization: Elastic Hobby: Gaming Susan Chang’s path into machine learning didn’t start in computer science — it started in economics. Whil...
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/top-down-with-susan-chang

item.title: [Infraestrutura] A Virtual Agent team at Docker: How the Coding Agent Sandboxes team uses a fleet of agents to ship faster
item.description:
📰 A Virtual Agent team at Docker: How the Coding Agent Sandboxes team uses a fleet of agents to ship faster
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
I work on Coding Agent Sandboxes, aka “sbx” at Docker. The project provides secure, microVM-based isolation for running AI coding agents like Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, Docker Agent and Kiro. Agents get full autonomy inside a sandbox (their own Docker daemon, network, filesystem) without touching your host system.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/a-virtual-agent-team-at-docker-how-the-coding-agent-sandboxes-team-uses-a-fleet-of-agents-to-ship-faster/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] How Many Users Can Your LLM Server Really Handle?
item.description:
📰 How Many Users Can Your LLM Server Really Handle?
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Deploying large language models (LLMs) in an enterprise environment has transitioned from a proof-of-concept exercise to a rigorous engineering discipline. Yet, accurately predicting the capacity of an inference server under real-world, concurrent load remains a formidable challenge. Infrastructure engineers frequently confront complex configuration spaces, questioning whether tuning parameters like –max-num-batched-...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/30/how-many-users-can-your-llm-server-really-handle/
